visual_spec_id.description: Logical visual specification UUID protected by this lock.

holder_agent.description: Agent process or role holding the lock.

holder_pid.description: Operating-system process ID of the lock holder.

holder_session_id.description: Agent session identifier holding the lock.

base_revision_id.description: Revision UUID on which the amendment is based.

acquired_at.description: Timestamp when the lock was acquired.

lease_expires_at.description: Timestamp when the lock lease expires if not renewed.

lease_renewed_at.description: Timestamp when the lease was last renewed.
